case_title: CHOW, FRANKLIN vs. CARDEN, MICHAEL W.

docket_entries.description: JUDGE MARY MORGAN ASSIGNED TO SUP CT. COURT RPT: DIANA CHEN (CSR 113120) CLERK: PATRICK YEN C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF.PRESENT & IN PRO PER. KEN LEUNG SWORN AS INTERP. PL. & DEF. SWORN & EXAMINED. PL. #1, RENT PAYMENT FROM 10-1-96 THRU 6-30-97, ID & EVID. PL. #2, 3-DAY NOTICE, ID & EVID. BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO SETTLE CASE UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS: DEF, MICHAEL CARDEN, AGREES TO PMTS SCHEDULE - 7-21-97 PAY $700 - 7-28-97 PAY $400 & EACH OF THE FOLLOWING MONDAYS UNTIL 10-28-97. MR. CARDEN MUST PAY RENT ON TIME THRU 4-1-98. IF DEF. PAYS ON TIME PL. WILL DISM. THIS ACTION. IF DEF. DOESN'T PAY ON TIME, PL. MAY HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEF. WITHOUT HRG. ALL EXHS. ORDERED RETURNED.
#1/LITTLE. CASE ASSIGNED TO SUPERIOR COURT ROOM 450 BEFORE JUDGE MARY MORGAN.
